title: TextDocument
description: An opened text document plus the metadata needed for safe save conflict detection. `content_hash` and `on_disk_modification_ms` together form the optimistic-concurrency baseline echoed back on save.

is_secret_restricted.description: True when the path matches a secret-looking name. Such paths are blocked for open/save; the flag exists so the UI can explain the refusal.

permissions_mode.description: Unix permission bits (e.g. `0o644`) of the on-disk file.

LineEnding.description: Detected dominant line ending of an opened document.

TextEncoding.description: Text encoding of an opened document. PR-031 only supports UTF-8; the enum is kept open so future encodings can be added without a breaking change.
